memoryArtifacts.headline: Vsevolod IV Svyatoslavich the Red (died August 1212)
memoryArtifacts.description: Vsevolod IV Svyatoslavich the Red (died August 1212) was a Rus' prince (a member of the Rurik dynasty). His baptismal name was Daniil. He was grand prince of Kiev (Kyiv, 1203, 1206, 1207, 1208 - 1212) …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Vsevolod IV of Kiev於1153年出生在烏克蘭Київ時，他的父親Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich34歲，母親Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk11150歲。他和Princess Maria Anastasia Piast至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1212年8月在烏克蘭Чернігівська областьЧернігів享年59歲，埋葬在烏克蘭Чернігівська областьЧернігів。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vsevolod IV of Kiev于1153年出生在乌克兰Київ时，他的父亲Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich34岁，母亲Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk11150岁。他和Princess Maria Anastasia Piast至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1212年8月在乌克兰Чернігівська областьЧернігів享年59岁，埋葬在乌克兰Чернігівська областьЧернігів。

nameMeanings.name: Vsevolod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slavic: from vse ‘all’ + volod ‘rule’, coined as a vernacular equivalent of Greek Pankratios.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Kiev
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Austrian German: occupational name for a cowherd, Chüyger in the Tyrolean dialect, from Kühe ‘cows’ (plural of Kuh) + -er suffix of agent nouns.
Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): variant of   Keir  .

variants.name: Kear
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, pronounced ‘keer’, in origin a variant of   Kerr .  The name has sometimes been chosen in honour of the trade unionist and first Labour MP,  James Keir Hardie  (  1856–1915 ), whose mother's maiden name was Keir.

en.lifeSummary: When Vsevolod IV of Kiev was born in 1153, in Kyiv, Ukraine, his father, Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich, was 34 and his mother, Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk, was 11150. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Princess Maria Anastasia Piast. He died in August 1212, in Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine, at the age of 59, and was buried in Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine.

fr.Ivanivka, Antratsytivs'kyi district, Luh: Ivanovka, Krasnodon, Voroshilovgrad, Ukraine, Union soviétique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vsevolod IV of Kiev est né en 1153, à Kyiv, Ukraine, son père, Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk, avait 11150 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Princess Maria Anastasia Piast. Il est décédé en août 1212, à Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vsevolod IV of Kiev 1153 in Kyiv, Ukraine geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich 34 und seine Mutter Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk 11150. Er hatte mit Princess Maria Anastasia Piast mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb im August 1212 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Tschernihiw, Chernihiv, Ukraine und wurde in Tschernihiw, Chernihiv, Ukraine begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vsevolod IV of Kiev è nato il nel 1153 nel Kyiv, Ucraina, il suo padre, Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk, aveva 11150 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Princess Maria Anastasia Piast. Morì nel agosto 1212, nel Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ucraina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ucraina.

ja.lifeSummary: Vsevolod IV of Kievが1153年にウクライナКиївで生まれた時，父Sviatoslav III Vsevolodichは34歳，母Maria Vasilkovna of Polotskは11150歳であった。彼はPrincess Maria Anastasia Piastとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1212年8月にウクライナЧернігівська областьЧернігівで59歳で死去し，ウクライナЧернігівська областьЧернігівにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Vsevolod IV of Kiev(이)가 1153년 우크라이나 Київ에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk(은)는 11150세였다. 그는 Princess Maria Anastasia Piast(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 8월 우크라이나 Чернігівська область Чернігів에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 우크라이나 Чернігівська область Чернігів에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vsevolod IV of Kiev nasceu em 1153, em Kyiv, Ucrânia, seu pai, Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk, tinha 11150 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Princess Maria Anastasia Piast. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1212, em Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ucrânia, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ucrânia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vsevolod IV of Kiev родился в 1153 г. в местности Киев, Украина, его отцу по имени Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk, 11150. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Princess Maria Anastasia Piast. Он умер август 1212 г. в местности Чернигов, Черниговская область, Украина в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Чернигов, Черниговская область, Украина.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vsevolod IV of Kiev nació en 1153, en Kyiv, Ucrania, su papá, Sviatoslav III Vsevolodich, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maria Vasilkovna of Polotsk, tenía 11150 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Princess Maria Anastasia Piast. Murió en agosto de 1212, en Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ucrania, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ucrania.
